M-070.NAME: matrix-visual-runtime
M-070.path: frontend/src/components/MatrixBackground.tsx frontend/src/components/VisualShell.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/MatrixBackground.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/VisualShell.tsx scripts/phase52-matrix-visual-smoke.mjs scripts/phase53-user-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs scripts/phase54-admin-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs scripts/phase59-motion-interactions-smoke.mjs docs/plans/Phase-52.xml docs/plans/Phase-53.xml docs/plans/Phase-54.xml docs/plans/Phase-59.xml docs/plans/Phase-67.xml scripts/phase67-auth-splash-smoke.mjs
M-070.owns: Shared React/Vite Matrix canvas runtime and CRT overlay mount points for the user frontend and admin frontend.

reference.source-1: TRUFFLEX matrix-background.js Matrix rain loop, resize behavior, pointer influence, and reduced-motion static fallback.
reference.source-2: TRUFFLEX style-system scanline, flicker, glitch, and matrix fade effects adapted to KrotPN operational screens.

public-interfaces.interface-1: MatrixBackground React component renders a fixed, pointer-events-none canvas layer.
public-interfaces.interface-2: VisualShell React component mounts MatrixBackground, scanline overlay, and app content with safe z-index boundaries.
public-interfaces.interface-3: MatrixBackground internal motion policy applies prefers-reduced-motion, tab visibility, resize, and canvas context guards.

constraints.constraint-1: Do not change backend APIs, auth flows, billing logic, VPN provisioning, MTProto provisioning, deploy scripts, install scripts, nginx, docker-compose, or runtime topology.
constraints.constraint-2: Canvas failures must degrade to a readable static background without uncaught exceptions.
constraints.constraint-3: Animations must stop or simplify under prefers-reduced-motion and inactive-tab conditions.
constraints.constraint-4: Do not import TRUFFLEX music, NFT content, spider physics, fluid cursor, or WebGL glow unless a later phase explicitly approves it.
constraints.constraint-5: Canvas and overlay layers must never intercept clicks, focus, keyboard navigation, or mobile scroll gestures.

acceptance.metric-1: Desktop and mobile screenshots prove the Matrix canvas is nonblank while content remains readable.
acceptance.metric-2: Reduced-motion screenshot proves a static readable fallback instead of a running animation loop.
acceptance.metric-3: Frontend and frontend-admin builds pass with no deploy/install diff.
acceptance.metric-4: Runtime smoke verifies no console errors from canvas init, resize, teardown, or missing context branches.

evidence.local-2026-06-03: Phase-52 implemented MatrixBackground and VisualShell for user/admin frontends, mounted both route trees, added static smoke, passed user/admin builds, and captured Chrome screenshots at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 1440x900, plus reduced-motion 390x844.
evidence.phase-53-local-2026-06-03: Phase-53 reused the runtime on all user routes, passed frontend build and Phase-53 smoke, captured production-preview auth screenshots with virtual-time-budget, and preserved pointer-events-none plus reduced-motion policy without deploy/install changes.
evidence.phase-54-verification-design-2026-06-03: Phase-54 verification gates require admin route canvas proof, pointer-safe overlays, reduced-motion admin fallback, no console canvas errors, and protected deploy/install/runtime isolation.
evidence.phase-54-local-2026-06-03: Phase-54 reused the existing admin VisualShell/MatrixBackground runtime, passed frontend-admin build and Phase-54 smoke, proved pointer-safe/reduced-motion admin markers statically, and made no deploy/install/nginx/docker-compose/runtime changes.
evidence.phase-59-local-2026-06-04: Phase-59 added route-motion markers to VisualShell and MatrixMotion reduced-motion, pointer-scroll, and inactive-tab lifecycle markers to MatrixBackground without changing canvas behavior; Phase-52 and Phase-59 smokes passed.

phase-67-plan.scope: Harden the user MatrixBackground browser-compatibility path used on splash/auth routes while preserving the existing visual shell contract.
phase-67-plan.required-behaviors: Feature-detect canvas, requestAnimationFrame, matchMedia addEventListener/addListener/removeListener variants, 2D context availability, resize cleanup, reduced-motion, and hidden-tab lifecycle without uncaught errors.
phase-67-plan.fallback: Unsupported or partially supported browser paths must render a readable static Matrix-safe background and never intercept pointer, keyboard, or scroll interactions.

crosslinks.phase-52: Matrix runtime foundation and shared shell integration.
crosslinks.phase-53: User cabinet Matrix redesign uses this runtime.
crosslinks.phase-54: Admin console Matrix redesign uses this runtime.
crosslinks.phase-59: Motion and microinteraction layer uses runtime lifecycle proof markers.
crosslinks.phase-67: Browser compatibility hardening for public splash and auth Matrix canvas behavior.
